title: Section 28
content: 1[28. Power to publish information.--The Reserve Bank or the National Bank, or both, if they consider it in the public interest so to do, may 2[publish-- (a) any information obtained by them under this Act in such consolidated form as they think fit; (b) in such manner as they may consider proper, any credit information disclosed under the Credit Information Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005 (30 of 2005).]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 61 of 1981, s. 61 and the Second Schedule, for s. 28 (w.e.f. 12-7-1982). 2. Subs. by Act 30 of 2005, s. 34 and the Schedule, for certain words (w.e.f. 14-12-2006).
